# RACI Matrix: [Project / Initiative Name]

> **Usage:** Copy this template and complete the matrix for your project. Update it whenever roles or activities change.
>
> **Key:**
> - **R** — Responsible (does the work)
> - **A** — Accountable (owns the outcome; final decision authority; only one per row)
> - **C** — Consulted (provides input before the decision/work)
> - **I** — Informed (notified of decisions/outcomes)

---

## Roles Legend

| Abbreviation | Role |
|---|---|
| PM | Project Manager |
| PdM | Product Manager |
| TL | Tech Lead / Engineering Lead |
| Dev | Developer(s) |
| QA | QA / Test Engineer |
| UX | UX Designer / Researcher |
| Sec | Security Lead |
| RM | Release Manager |
| SRE | Site Reliability / Operations |
| CS | Customer Support / Success |
| Spon | Stakeholder / Sponsor |

---

## Activity Matrix

| Activity | PM | PdM | TL | Dev | QA | UX | Sec | RM | SRE | CS | Spon |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Define problem statement & goals | C | A | C | C | I | C | I | I | I | C | I |
| Approve project charter | I | C | I | I | I | I | I | I | I | I | A |
| Create and prioritize backlog | C | A | C | C | C | C | I | I | I | C | I |
| Architecture & technical design | C | I | A | R | C | I | C | I | C | I | I |
| Security review | C | I | C | C | C | I | A | C | C | I | I |
| UX design & prototyping | I | C | I | C | C | A | I | I | I | C | I |
| Sprint execution | R | I | C | R | R | R | I | I | I | I | I |
| Code review & merge | I | I | C | R | I | I | C | I | I | I | I |
| Test plan & execution | I | I | C | C | A | C | C | I | I | C | I |
| Release readiness sign-off | R | C | C | C | C | I | C | A | C | C | C |
| Deployment execution | I | I | C | C | I | I | I | A | R | I | I |
| Post-deployment monitoring | I | I | C | C | I | I | C | I | A | I | I |
| Stakeholder status updates | A | C | I | I | I | I | I | I | I | I | I |
| Retrospective facilitation | A | C | C | C | C | C | I | C | C | I | I |
| Security incident response | I | I | C | C | C | I | A | C | R | I | I |
| Operational incident response | I | I | C | C | I | I | C | C | A | I | I |

---

## Customisation Notes

- Add or remove rows for activities specific to your project.
- Add or remove columns for roles not involved in your project.
- Each row must have **exactly one A** (Accountable).
- Roles with **R** must also be included in sprint planning and tasking.

---
